---
title: "Research"
toc: true
---

## Overview

I study statistical methods and apply them to biomedical research questions. 



---

## Human Genetics and Statistics

Description of your work in human genetics and statistics. What methods do you develop or apply? What questions motivate this line of research?

### Selected Publications

1. **Boehm, F.**, Author, B., & Author, C. (2025). Title of paper. *Journal Name*, *vol*(issue), pages. [doi:10.xxxx/xxxxx](https://doi.org)

---

## Observational Studies and Causal Inference

Description of your work on observational studies and causal inference. What problems do you address? What methods or frameworks do you use?

### Selected Publications

1. **Boehm, F.** & Author, B. (2024). Title of paper. *Journal Name*, *vol*(issue), pages. [doi:10.xxxx/xxxxx](https://doi.org)

---

## Statistics and Mathematics Education Research

Description of your education research interests. What aspects of teaching and learning in statistics or mathematics do you study?

### Selected Publications

1. **Boehm, F.** (2024). Title of paper. *Journal of Statistics Education*, *vol*(issue), pages. [doi:10.xxxx/xxxxx](https://doi.org)

---

## Mouse Genetics and Statistics

Description of your work in mouse genetics. What biological or statistical questions drive this research? Do you develop software or pipelines?

### Selected Publications

1. **Boehm, F.**, Author, B., & Author, C. (2023). Title of paper. *Genetics*, *vol*(issue), pages. [doi:10.xxxx/xxxxx](https://doi.org)

---

## Other Collaborations

Description of other collaborative projects you are involved in across disciplines.

### Selected Publications

1. Author, A., **Boehm, F.**, & Author, C. (2024). Title of paper. *Journal Name*, *vol*(issue), pages. [doi:10.xxxx/xxxxx](https://doi.org)
